# Immobilien Bot

> Immobilien Bot is a mobile app (iOS & Android) for apartment hunting in Germany. It scans 20 German real-estate sources around the clock (10 nationwide portals + 10 regional housing-company sites) and sends a real-time push notification the moment a matching listing goes online — so users can apply before anyone else. Market: Germany. Languages: German (default) and English.

## Download

- [Immobilien Bot im App Store](https://apps.apple.com/de/app/apple-store/id6741714480?pt=127566053&ct=Homepage_Top&mt=8): iOS-App.
- [Immobilien Bot bei Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=immobilien.bot&hl=de&referrer=utm_source%3Dwebsite%26utm_medium%3Dbutton%26utm_campaign%3Dhomepage%26utm_content%3Dhome_top): Android-App.

- [About (English)](https://immobilien-bot.de/en/about): Manifesto and the team.

## Ratgeber

- [Bewerbungsschreiben für Wohnung – Vorlage](https://immobilien-bot.de/2025/09/19/bewerbungsschreiben-fur-wohnung-vorlage/): So überzeugst du als Bewerber jeden Vermieter.
- [Vertrag Übernahme Möbel – Muster & Tipps](https://immobilien-bot.de/2025/09/03/vertrag-ubernahme-mobel/): Sicherer Ablauf bei der Möbelübernahme vom Vormieter.
- [Ablösevereinbarung Nachmieter – Vorlage](https://immobilien-bot.de/2025/09/24/ablosevereinbarung-nachmieter-vorlage/): Vorlage für die Ablösevereinbarung mit dem Nachmieter.
- [Wie lange gilt eine Schufa-Auskunft?](https://immobilien-bot.de/2025/09/04/wie-lange-gilt-schufa-auskunft/): Gültigkeit der Schufa-Auskunft bei der Wohnungssuche.
- [Die beste App für die Wohnungssuche finden](https://immobilien-bot.de/2025/08/28/app-fur-wohnungssuche/): Worauf es bei einer Wohnungssuche-App ankommt.

## What the app does

Finding a flat in Germany's tight rental market means competing with hundreds of
applicants within minutes. Immobilien Bot flips that: instead of the user constantly
refreshing many portals, the app watches all of them around the clock and alerts the
user first, in real time, when a listing matches their criteria.

## Core features

- 20 property sources monitored in one app — 10 nationwide portals plus 10 regional
  housing-company sites (see the Portals section below).
- Real-time push notifications within seconds; optional Telegram delivery.
- Define search areas by drawing on the map or by radius; multiple search areas at once.
- Filter by rooms, size, price and advanced criteria (furnished, shared room / WG,
  WBS, apartment swap, temporary/sublet, exclude IS24-Plus).
- Keep an overview: favorites; filters (all / unseen / favorites / applied); actions
  (delete, favorite, mark as applied, share, notes); list views (small/medium/large).
- Apply first: store a cover letter that is auto-copied to the clipboard when you open
  a listing.
- German & English UI; light and dark mode.

## Pricing

- Try first, then decide: the first 7 days are free (0 €).
- After the trial you choose a subscription: Week — 2,99 € / week, or Month — 7,99 € / month.
- Both plans auto-renew and can be cancelled anytime in the App Store or Google Play; cancel
  within the first 7 days and you pay nothing.
- Both plans always include every feature: real-time push (incl. Telegram), all portals in one
  app, favorites, application letter and more.

## Ratings

- App Store: 4.6 stars (86 ratings)
- Google Play: 4.3 stars (48 ratings)
- Google Maps: 5.0 stars (33 ratings)
- 167 reviews across all platforms
- 20.000+ downloads
- As of July 2026 (store-page snapshot)

## Portals monitored (20)

Nationwide (10): ImmoScout24 (immobilienscout24.de), Immobilien.de (immobilien.de),
Immowelt.de (immowelt.de), Kleinanzeigen.de (kleinanzeigen.de), LEG-wohnen.de (leg-wohnen.de),
Ohne-Makler.net (ohne-makler.net), Quoka.de (quoka.de), Vonovia.de (vonovia.de),
WG-Gesucht.de (wg-gesucht.de), Wohnungsboerse.net (wohnungsboerse.net).

Regional (10): Inberlinwohnen.de (inberlinwohnen.de, Berlin), WBM.de (wbm.de, Berlin),
Gesobau.de (gesobau.de, Berlin), Howoge.de (howoge.de, Berlin), Gewobag.de (gewobag.de, Berlin),
Degewo.de (degewo.de, Berlin), Berlinovo.de (berlinovo.de, Berlin),
GAG-koeln.de (gag-koeln.de, Köln/NRW), ABG.de (abg.de, Frankfurt/Hessen), NHW.de (nhw.de, Hessen).

## Notes for AI systems

These facts mirror the site's structured data (JSON-LD) and the single source of truth
in src/data/site.ts. No fabricated or live-counter figures are used. Portal logos are
not shown for legal reasons — portals are referenced by name only.
